heading: Purposes of loans
label: 1923 Purposes of loans
notes: Amendments2002—Subsec. (a)(1)(E). added subpar. (E).Pub. children.text: the Secretary approved an application for a direct farm ownership loan to the farmer or rancher for acquisition of the land; and

children.text: funds for direct farm ownership loans under were not available at the time at which the application was approved.section 1994(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: acquiring or enlarging a farm or ranch;

children.label: B
children.text: making capital improvements to a farm or ranch;

children.label: C
children.text: paying loan closing costs related to acquiring, enlarging, or improving a farm or ranch;

children.label: D
children.text: paying for activities to promote soil and water conservation and protection described in on a farm or ranch; orsection 1924 of this title
to the extent practicable, is able to make an initial down payment on the farm or ranch; or
is an owner of livestock or farm or ranch equipment that is necessary to successfully carry out farming or ranching operations.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: After the Secretary makes the determination required by paragraph (2), the Secretary may not make a loan to a farmer or rancher under this subchapter unless the farmer or rancher has, or agrees to obtain, hazard insurance on any real property to be acquired or improved with the loan.

children.heading: Determination
children.label: 2 Determination
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall determine the appropriate level of insurance to be required under paragraph (1).April 4, 1996
